raw_input:
Extract event information as JSON. Fields: event_name (string), start_datetime (ISO 8601 local, with NO timezone suffix, e.g. '2026-06-10T10:00'), end_datetime (ISO 8601 local), timezone (IANA zone name like 'Europe/Berlin' — derive from the abbreviation), location (string), organizer (string), virtual (boolean: true if explicitly virtual/online, false otherwise), duration_minutes (integer).

Notice:
"Q2 All-Hands Meeting hosted by Priya Raman on Wednesday, 10 June 2026 from 10:00 to 11:30 CEST in the Main Auditorium (Berlin office). In-person only — no dial-in."

Return only the JSON object.
constraints: datetimes without timezone suffix, IANA zone in separate field
